Translations help make the application accessible to users around the world.

Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this request.
- [ ] I verified the translation in context where possible.
- [ ] The translation is clear, accurate, and natural.
- [ ] I understand that translations may be reviewed before being accepted.

Thank you for helping make Dearog Password Manager available to more users around the world.
